title: Passport Link
description: A typed link between two Digital Product Passports. The base schema models reusable relationship kinds; ecosystem and regulation packs can map these to their own lifecycle terminology.

linkedPassportId.description: The passportId of the linked passport (predecessor or successor)

linkType.description: Generic relationship kind between passports. Packs may define pack-specific terminology while preserving these base relationship semantics.

linkedBy.description: Actor identifier that created this link
